top.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
top.summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

topIndia.title: Nvidia begins Vera CPU sales pitch to Chinese clients, sources say
topIndia.summary: The outreach underscores how the world's most valuable company is quickly pivoting to the new product to revive its rapidly declining fortunes in China, as shipments of its second-most powerful AI chip, the H200, to the country have stalled for months.
